title: LogoffSMTP
text: LogoffSMTP Log off the SMTP server. LogoffSMTP() Parameters None Return Values Table 1. Values returned by SendMail in $status Value Description 0 Success -8 Not logged on -9 Network problems Description The LogoffSMTP operation is used to log off the SMTP server, thus closing the connection opened by LogonSMTP . Use LogoffSMTP only after all mails have been sent using SendMail . Related Links LogonSMTP Log on to the designated SMTP server via TCP or TLS. SendMail Send an email message, specifying the header, body, and attachments. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
